name: Kigurumi Dress Up
author: Poki
description: Kigurumi Dress Up is a cute dress up game where you can style your character in your favorite cozy kigurumi outfits! Mix and match hairstyles, eyes, hats, clothes, bags, and even tails and wings to create the perfect look. From adorable animals to playful styles, the possibilities are endless. Ready to design your dream kigurumi outfit? How to play Kigurumi Dress Up? Click or tap to choose the item. Who created Kigurumi Dress Up? Kigurumi Dress Up is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Anime Dress Up , Block Sandbox , Beauty Salon , Brainrot Clicker , Fruit Wheel , Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover , Hockey Stars , My Cozy Home , Nails DIY: Manicure Master , Star Blogger: Left or Right , Stickman Race , Stickman Bike , Tag , Tag 2 , wall-jumper! How can I play Kigurumi Dress Up for free? You can play Kigurumi Dress Up for free on Poki. Can I play Kigurumi Dress Up on mobile devices and desktop? Kigurumi Dress Up can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
